differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune Hemolytic Anemia (AIHA) with secondary bone marrow failure
next_steps: Flow cytometry for PNH (CD55 and CD59 on red cells and granulocytes)
Bone marrow biopsy including aspirate for morphology, flow cytometry, and cytogenetics
Serum haptoglobin, reticulocyte count, and plasma free hemoglobin to confirm and quantify hemolysis
Cold agglutinin titer and Donath-Landsteiner test
Serial monitoring of complete blood counts and liver function tests
Peripheral blood smear review by a hematopathologist
